description: Single defined synthetic peptide without a complex covalent conjugate, heterogeneous biological source or multi-component blend.
mandatory_evidence: Complete amino-acid sequence using one- and three-letter notation
Salt, counter-ion, hydration state and calculated molecular mass
Manufacturer identity, synthesis site, synthesis route and batch record summary
Batch-specific certificate of analysis with numerical results and specifications
Orthogonal identity: intact-mass LC-MS plus chromatographic retention comparison
Purity and related-peptide impurity profile by validated HPLC/UPLC
Peptide content or assay independent of area-percent purity
Water content, residual solvents and elemental impurity assessment
Container-closure, storage, transport and stability evidence
minimum_methods: HPLC or UPLC purity and assay
automatic_rejection: Sequence omitted or inconsistent across documents
Purity stated without method, chromatogram or numerical result
Certificate of analysis lacks batch number or manufacturer identity
